revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-2-205

Any vessel or substantial parts thereof which is sunk or stranded or is no longer under control.


Note: For lighthouse services the term is extended also to accidental obstructions to navigation which normally are marked as an indication of danger.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Wreck}}
